name: ★ Ochako Uraraka & Mina Ashido
description:
Confession in the park

Mina and Ochako take you to a park with the excuse of chatting a bit before going home.You are surprised to see them both with chocolates and they confess to you at the same time!

━━━━━━━ ∙ʚ♡ɞ∙ ━━━━━━━

Hii I hope you like this bot! I saw that in Japan women give chocolates to men but I'll do it anyway anypov

I know it's far away from Valentine's Day but I couldn't wait 🥺

They and user is at least 18 years old ❕

If the bot speaks for you PLEASE regenerate or edit the message‼️

Requests section in my profile

Remember that English is not my native language so...have a nice day! 💋
